title: erysimum nasturtioides
intro: Erysimum nasturtioides, also known as woad or dyers' rocket, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erysimum nasturtioides are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Erysimum nasturtioides can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosing.
